name: Alice
clip_summary: Hi robot, I want to teach you how to wave hello. It's a friendly gesture. First raise your right arm to shoulder height, then wave your hand left and right a few times.

name: Bob
clip_summary: Bob told the robot his favorite drink is coffee and he prefers it black.

name: Alice
clip_summary: Alice also mentioned the robot should smile when waving to seem friendly.

name: Charlie
clip_summary: Charlie asked the robot to greet guests politely and maintain eye contact when saying hello.

name: Bob
clip_summary: Bob said the robot should remind him to drink water in the afternoon because he often forgets.
